consexpressionR 0.99.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

NCBI GEO access GSE95077 dataset

Source: R/gse95077.R
gse95077.Rd

Amiloride, an old diuretic drug, is a potential therapeutic agent for multiple myeloma Report ...

Usage

gse95077

Format

.csv

A data frame with 31 rows and 6 columns:

design

Poly A+ RNA from KMS12-BM and JJN3 cells untreated or treated with amiloride or TG003 (0.1 mM, 0.4 mM, and 0.4 mM respectively) for 24 h was isolated and prepared for RNA-seq.

organism

Homo Sapiens

year

2018

...

Source

https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE95077

Examples

data(gse95077)
str(gse95077)
#> 'data.frame':	31 obs. of  6 variables:
#>  $ BM_AMIL_141053: int  12438 22853 1491 1932 15617 5421 4107 1653 5314 2593 ...
#>  $ BM_AMIL_141059: int  14016 25745 2525 1459 15890 5879 4482 2011 6152 3204 ...
#>  $ BM_AMIL_141065: int  10100 18618 1487 962 12190 4588 2261 1210 3279 2010 ...
#>  $ JJ_AMIL_141050: int  8011 17013 1145 1359 18716 4528 4227 1292 3077 5171 ...
#>  $ JJ_AMIL_141056: int  13243 23773 1709 2856 31929 6831 6877 2022 8009 7191 ...
#>  $ JJ_AMIL_141062: int  13623 27516 1979 2078 33424 6993 6836 1956 6983 7702 ...
